mapper.select: select t2.PRINT_OPTION, t2.PRINT_TEMPLATE FROM from APP_FORM_SETS t2 where t2.FORM_CODE = #{formCode}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM APPDATA.APPDATA_PRINT_QUEUE apq WHERE apq.TASK_ID = (SELECT apt.ID FROM APPDATA.APPDATA_PRINT_TASKS apt WHERE apt.DATA_ID = #{dataId} AND apt.DATA_SRC = #{dataSrc} AND apt.REC_REMOVE = '-1') AND apq .PRINTER_ID = #{printerId}
mapper.select: select apt.id from APPDATA.APPDATA_PRINT_TASKS apt WHERE apt.DATA_ID = #{dataId} AND apt.DATA_SRC = #{dataSrc} AND apt.REC_REMOVE = '-1'
